list.name: health_exchange
list.label: Exchange
list.query: SELECT exchange AS __text, exchange AS __value FROM data_health_exchange_1m ORDER BY 1
list.definition: SELECT exchange AS __text, exchange AS __value FROM data_health_exchange_1m ORDER BY 1

targets.rawSql: SELECT active_symbols AS value FROM data_health_exchange_1m WHERE exchange = '${health_exchange}'

SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE active_recent AND (candle_1m_latest_raw_time IS NULL OR latest_feature_time IS NULL OR COALESCE(candle_1m_raw_lag_seconds, 999999) > 90 OR COALESCE(feature_lag_seconds, 999999) > 180 OR recent_feature_rows_24h = 0)) AS value FROM data_health_symbol_1m WHERE exchange = '${health_exchange}'

SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE active_recent AND candle_1m_latest_raw_time IS NOT NULL AND latest_feature_time IS NOT NULL AND COALESCE(candle_1m_raw_lag_seconds, 0) <= 90 AND COALESCE(feature_lag_seconds, 0) <= 180 AND recent_feature_rows_24h > 0 AND (coverage_ratio < 0.98 OR finalized_ratio < 0.95 OR recent_execution_observed_share_24h < 0.55)) AS value FROM data_health_symbol_1m WHERE exchange = '${health_exchange}'

SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE active_recent AND candle_1m_latest_raw_time IS NOT NULL AND latest_feature_time IS NOT NULL AND COALESCE(candle_1m_raw_lag_seconds, 0) <= 90 AND COALESCE(feature_lag_seconds, 0) <= 180 AND recent_feature_rows_24h > 0 AND coverage_ratio >= 0.98 AND finalized_ratio >= 0.95 AND recent_execution_observed_share_24h >= 0.55) AS value FROM data_health_symbol_1m WHERE exchange = '${health_exchange}'
SELECT COALESCE(max_candle_1m_raw_lag_seconds, 0) AS value FROM data_health_exchange_1m WHERE exchange = '${health_exchange}'
SELECT COALESCE(max_feature_lag_seconds, 0) AS value FROM data_health_exchange_1m WHERE exchange = '${health_exchange}'

SELECT symbol, CASE WHEN NOT active_recent THEN 'inactive' WHEN candle_1m_latest_raw_time IS NULL OR latest_feature_time IS NULL OR COALESCE(candle_1m_raw_lag_seconds, 999999) > 90 OR COALESCE(feature_lag_seconds, 999999) > 180 OR recent_feature_rows_24h = 0 THEN 'critical' WHEN coverage_ratio < 0.98 OR finalized_ratio < 0.95 OR recent_execution_observed_share_24h < 0.55 THEN 'degraded' ELSE 'healthy' END AS status, candle_1m_raw_lag_seconds, feature_lag_seconds, ROUND((coverage_ratio * 100)::numeric, 2) AS coverage_pct, ROUND((finalized_ratio * 100)::numeric, 2) AS finalized_pct, ROUND((recent_execution_observed_share_24h * 100)::numeric, 2) AS exec_share_24h_pct, latest_feature_time, finalized_through FROM data_health_symbol_1m WHERE exchange = '${health_exchange}' ORDER BY CASE WHEN NOT active_recent THEN 0 WHEN candle_1m_latest_raw_time IS NULL OR latest_feature_time IS NULL OR COALESCE(candle_1m_raw_lag_seconds, 999999) > 90 OR COALESCE(feature_lag_seconds, 999999) > 180 OR recent_feature_rows_24h = 0 THEN 3 WHEN coverage_ratio < 0.98 OR finalized_ratio < 0.95 OR recent_execution_observed_share_24h < 0.55 THEN 2 ELSE 1 END DESC, candle_1m_raw_lag_seconds DESC NULLS LAST, feature_lag_seconds DESC NULLS LAST, symbol ASC LIMIT 40

SELECT symbol, candle_1m_raw_lag_seconds, trade_raw_lag_seconds, orderbook_l2_raw_lag_seconds, funding_raw_lag_seconds, recent_feature_rows_24h, ROUND((recent_trade_observed_share_24h * 100)::numeric, 2) AS trade_obs_24h_pct, ROUND((recent_orderbook_observed_share_24h * 100)::numeric, 2) AS book_obs_24h_pct, ROUND((recent_execution_observed_share_24h * 100)::numeric, 2) AS exec_obs_24h_pct FROM data_health_symbol_1m WHERE exchange = '${health_exchange}' AND active_recent ORDER BY candle_1m_raw_lag_seconds DESC NULLS LAST, trade_raw_lag_seconds DESC NULLS LAST, symbol ASC LIMIT 40
